samples:
I remember when I first spoke
Your name into the air
And said you went away with me

Kept your word and stuck to your task
Took it all as we talked
Never thought I'd see a reason why
You lied


Lost track of days, months, years
Once summer comes along
When winter falls in Winter
A year apart at least

No matter how hard I try
Can never get ahead
So many questions linger inside
Searching for an answer yet


In desperate need
The moon hung high above
Still shining on me
Blank stare at everything
Yet still there is nothing left to know



Summer's gone again
Sun sets on Summer lands
Searing skin with heat
White faced ghost returns and haunts


Found out by everyone now
Even people close to home
Many will leave no trace behind
Some died to shun dismay




Ghost wept its lamentation
Wailing "summer" unto Fall
Losing time was no feat now
Gone without a trace from the start


Summoning winds are howling
Winter holds her breath
She rose she rose she rose
She rose

Summer is coming
Time for a holiday
A wish to get away
Ah~ Ah~ Ah~ Ah~


Kept inside her head
Her thoughts of you would never leave
She longed so desperately
To feel the rains on her skin



She went to bed alone once again
Would she ever find solace in her lonely sleep?
Did she shun her friends and family now, yes or no
Would they even notice if her spirit spoke to me?


Ghost shadows moving through her chest
Searing scars on her flesh
And there's sorrow in her eyes
As she whispers "I was here"

Have you wondered why
Someone left without a trace
Have you wondered why
Someone lied about their name
Have you wondered why
Someone went too far
Have you wondered why
Someone died inside


Ghost shadows moving through her chest
Searing scars on her flesh
And sorrow in her eyes as she whispers "I was here"

Once she has given birth...

In the name of love
I said I would stay
Lost in dismay
When winter came


Sleep in Winter Sleep until my soul leave the cage
Rest your head And ease your ache, ease your ache
Still my rage Still my rage

Kept inside this cage
You are stuck to me and so am I
Never leave a trace
Have no trace remains you and I

Rest your head And ease your ache, ease your ache
Still my rage Still my rage

Out on the road
Driving home alone
Blank stare ahead
Soul torn apart

Summer is coming now
She rose her head and turned round
Her eyes met mine and she spoke to me
Her voice cracked and broke
"Go away"

She whispered "Go away"
Red mist clouded her view

Saw me as a ghost and fled from me
She wept as if for her plight alone
A mother's sorrow caress...


Lost all pride while leaving me
Once her wish was granted
Came back to her world
But what remained....

Blank stare ahead
Soul torn apart
Summer is coming now
She rose her head and turned round
Her eyes met mine and she spoke to me
Her voice cracked and broke
"Leave me be"

She whispered "Leave me be"

Lost sight of home
Searching to roam
Found a reason why

Ghost in the snow
A trail below
White faced with dismay

An idol for me
Kept company
She rose when I went down
Her eyes gave it away


Lost sight of home
Searching to roam
Found a reason why

Ghost in the snow
A trail below
White faced with dismay

An idol for me
Kept company
She rose when I went down
Her eyes gave it away



Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray


Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray
Ghost inside is afraid
That you shall leave her and leave her astray

Time to leave the nest
Searching for my peace
Summer nights are here
A longing seeping through


Came back from the war
Still haunted by despair
She died in winter's arms
His name her final breath


Sleep inside of me, sleep inside of me

Lost all reason left
Ghost haunting my being
Slave to her false word
Her child is mine alone



Came back from the war
Still haunted by despair
She died in winter's arms
His name her final breath

Lost all reason left
Ghost haunting my being
Slave to her false word
Her child is mine alone

Came back from the war
Still haunted by despair
She died in winter's arms
His name her final breath

Lost all reason left
Ghost haunting my being
Slave to her false word
Her child is mine alone

White faced haggard grin

Whispered lies she spoke
Searing glance she gave
Her touch caressing skin
I rose and told her
"Leave"


Kept her at bay with words
Pouring caress into her lonely void
Once she had her wish her gaze fell
"Would you leave if I asked?"

Once you leave, I'll wonder where you are
And wish to know the reason why...

Don't forget a friend is waiting here for you
Leave your mark and leave me be


When you leave my world,I won't linger on
But should our eyes meet again
A longing in me will burn as one
The seed has been sown




Don't forget a friend is waiting here for you
Leave your mark and leave me be



Time goes by and still she waits alone
She knows not what her days may hold
Her spirit cries out "why" when she comes clean
Her name is Rose


Don't forget a friend is waiting here for you
Leave your mark and leave me be





Saw her face and spoke her name
She spoke mine then left me be
Kept me near and then gave in
To her wish to leave me be






Lost all pride in her lonely plight
Outcast from her flock
Still sought shelter within her plight
Her child becomes her flock


She rose before sunrise
Pouring light upon this earth
Her words became her curse
Old wound bleeding in its wake

Ghost in memories, ghost of what used to be
Kept me waiting while you went away


The sound of the rain is pouring down on my skin
Drenched in liquid that runs through my veins
The memory burns within me like a wildfire


Blank stares into empty space
I cling onto what used to be
You promised me forever and then lied


Leave now dear and never return again
Pour salt on the wounds that are bleeding out
Turn round to leave me without a trace


Once undone I’ll see no reason why
Would ever be the plight of someone so afraid
To say goodbye


A mother comforts her child with soothing words
She tells him she loves him from the core of her heart
Her loneliness for his departure is deep


Old memories linger with nothing remaining
Have faded long since our time apart
Lost all connection to us is stuck inside tears


No hope for redemption once we leave
We cried ourselves asleep as we wept for love
Gone but not forgotten always tied by faith


A father consoles his son until morning comes
Whispered words tell of loss and despair
His final wish that it would end here


Still haunted by grief he seeks another word
Searching high into the darkest nights
Never spoke to shun this pain


Waiting for me when I turn round and leave
Saying "Goodbye" before closing the door
Gone and left behind shattered dreams

Out on the road with nowhere to go
Someone cries for me I know she needs her sleep
Her eyes wide open to welcome Winter


Found herself alone with only sorrow to cling unto

A longing wish of a lonely soul
Lost in an empty void that knows not
Where it treads but leads the way
Towards the coldest river stream
And takes our breath away


An idle sigh for evermore
Resting on silver snow white
She rose and gazed down her mother's throat
His voice spoke to her "you should leave"
Her face blazed with hatred

Her lips spoke these words unto me
She told me I was hers alone
I said I loved her, she went astray
Once her wish was done and undone
Her spirit cried out in despair

Kept inside this barren shell
The winds took her warmth away
The final morning came as she wept
She saw her plight unravel
In dismay she held her breath

Still, there would be no answer given
From those who know her name
She told us all we wept beneath her spell
We rose up from our sleep
She rose above all else
She left her mark upon her flesh

Summer is over, Autumn is here
Leave me be my name is clear
Pale ghost sighs as the moon turns away


Lost sight of all reason and left you behind
Your name was lost in her eyes to save her pride
She rose from her sleep she spoke your name




Once again Summer comes back for us
Her glance on our plight casts a shadow on us
She rose from her sleep she spoke your name



Once again Summer comes back for us
Her glance on our plight casts a shadow on us
She rose from her sleep she spoke your name

White faced haggard in despair
Icy roads beneath my feet
Searing mark seared into my skin
Still lingering haunting memory

Soul torn apart by jealous wish
Wielding fury and stark desire
Staring blankly towards the earth
Restless spirit takes me higher

Lost sight of all reason and left you behind
Your name was lost in her eyes to save her pride
She rose from her sleep she spoke your name

After a year of longing, you finally said her name
She gave herself to me alone in the pouring rain


Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me

Summer is miles away, winter has come again
She spoke those final words and she turned round to leave her mark on the sands of time


Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me



Summer is miles away, winter has come again
She spoke those final words and she turned round to leave her mark on the sands of time


Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
Carry her home for me
